Echo Rive Animation Asset License Notice

Copyright (c) EchoMem and its licensors. All rights reserved.

The Rive animation files in this directory, including
echo_general-file-18.riv, are proprietary Echo character and animation
assets. They are provided only for display inside the Echo Memory local UI
as distributed by EchoMem.

The open source license for the repository source code does not grant any
right to extract, copy, modify, redistribute, sublicense, train on, or reuse
these Rive animation files, character designs, motion designs, names, or
related brand assets in another product, service, website, model, dataset,
or artwork.

You may run the Echo Memory local UI with these assets intact. Any other use
requires prior written permission from EchoMem.
